leads.address: Milwaukee / W Wells St and N 27th St area
leads.nextAction: Send barbershop follow-up, ask for owner or manager, pitch $250 AI Growth Tune-Up.
leads.research: Known for quality haircuts, basketball-themed brand, appointments, memberships, community focus, and multiple locations. Pitch around no-shows, reviews, memberships, rebooking, and social content.
leads.notes: Visited on Day 1. Need decision-maker name, direct phone/email, and 20-minute follow-up call.

leads.org: Near West Side Business Corridor Contact
leads.nextAction: Send corridor partnership follow-up and ask who supports small business programming.
leads.research: Potential connector to multiple small businesses, nonprofits, churches, and service storefronts in the Near West Side region.
leads.notes: Visited on Day 1. Need direct contact and meeting.

leads.nextAction: Walk in or call church office. Ask who handles administration, communications, newsletters, events, and volunteer coordination.
leads.research: Church office target. Pitch AI for announcements, newsletters, volunteer coordination, event reminders, donation communication, youth materials, and office workflow.
leads.notes: Recommended Day 1 next stop after Ballers Club and Near West Side corridor.

leads.address: Milwaukee area - verify exact address before visiting
leads.nextAction: Verify location, call or walk in. Ask who handles quote intake, design requests, customer communication, and production workflow.
leads.research: Print shop target. Pitch AI for quote intake, messy design request summaries, order updates, customer follow-up, and production notes.

leads.address: Milwaukee area - verify exact address before visiting
leads.role: Owner / Production Manager / Customer Service Manager
leads.nextAction: Verify distance from current region before visiting. Ask about quotes, job notes, proofing, and follow-up bottlenecks.
leads.research: Longstanding print shop target. Pitch front-end communication cleanup and workflow organization.

leads.role: Business Services / Employer Services / Training Partnership
leads.nextAction: Call and ask for employer services, business services, workforce training, or partnership contact.
leads.research: Workforce development target. Pitch AI readiness for workforce participants, employer partners, resumes, job search, workplace communication, and staff productivity.
leads.notes: Large strategic target. More likely meeting booking than same-day sale.

leads.role: Workforce Solutions / Employer Training / Customized Training
leads.nextAction: Email or call workforce solutions contact. Pitch practical AI readiness workshop for employers and learners.
leads.research: Employer training and workforce education target. Strong fit for AI literacy and workplace productivity curriculum.
leads.notes: Use training center infographic and workshop offer.

leads.nextAction: Email or call. Pitch AI readiness workshop for entrepreneurs and small businesses.
leads.research: Small business development target. Could become a referral and workshop channel.
leads.notes: Ask whether LeeWay can support business clients through a practical AI readiness session.

leads.role: Member Services / Small Business Programming / Events
leads.nextAction: Call or email. Pitch AI readiness workshop for small businesses, nonprofits, and members.
leads.research: Small business and nonprofit support channel. Could open multiple member leads.
leads.notes: Position as practical member education, not software sales.

leads.org: African American Chamber of Commerce of Wisconsin
leads.nextAction: Call or email. Pitch AI readiness for African American-owned businesses and founders.
leads.research: Business growth and member support channel. Strong alignment with local founder and community identity.
leads.notes: Position LeeWay as practical AI training and business support.

leads.nextAction: Call or email. Pitch AI readiness for learners, job seekers, and workforce partners.
leads.research: Training and workforce facility target. Strong fit for AI literacy, resumes, workplace communication, and job readiness.

leads.nextAction: Email partnership contact. Pitch Milwaukee AI Transformation Architect / LeeWay readiness workshop.
leads.research: Tech talent and regional workforce target. Better for strategic meeting than immediate sale.
leads.notes: Use as door-opener for credibility and ecosystem connection.

leads.nextAction: Email. Pitch AI operations capacity-building for nonprofits.
leads.research: Nonprofit capacity target. Pitch grant support, donor communication, reporting, board updates, and admin burden reduction.

leads.org: Milwaukee County DHHS Workforce Training & Development
leads.nextAction: Email or call. Pitch responsible AI training for documentation, service communication, and staff productivity.
leads.research: Public-service staff training target. Keep pitch careful, governance-first, and human oversight oriented.
leads.notes: Do not overpromise. Lead with safe admin productivity and training.

leads.nextAction: Research contact and email. Pitch AI readiness as workforce infrastructure.
leads.research: Workforce funding ecosystem target. Better for partnership and grant-aligned conversations.
leads.notes: Strategic lead, not likely same-day close.

activities.note: Visited Ballers Club Barbershop GO on Day 1. Need owner or manager contact. Strong fit for $250 AI Growth Tune-Up.
